bead.title: specs: FEAT-006/010/014 updates + ADR-021 (escalation policy)
bead.description: Update FEAT-006 (agent service), FEAT-010 (run architecture), FEAT-014 (token awareness) to reflect: (a) DDx escalation ladder built on existing MinPower/MaxPower (no Fizeau extension needed); (b) reviewer pairing via MinPower bump + Role/CorrelationID telemetry (best-effort 'different provider'); (c) reviewer cost charged to cost cap. Author ADR-021 documenting the design: Day 1 = pure observability; future Fizeau routing intelligence keyed on Role/CorrelationID is a Fizeau-internal evolution and is NOT specified or required by DDx.
bead.acceptance: 1. All three FEATs updated. 2. ADR-021 authored. 3. ddx doc audit clean.

events.body: {"rationale":"Bead scores 3/8 on the authoring rubric. Passing: parent+deps explicit (ddx-e34994e2 + 4 deps listed), standalone description (no /tmp refs, no chat references). Failing or partial on six criteria: (1) Title is a noun phrase, not an imperative verb — 'specs:' is a scope tag, not a command. (2) No file:line references anywhere — agent cannot identify which files hold FEAT-006/010/014 or where ADR-021 should land. (3) AC has numbers but zero verifiable test names or go test -run filters. (4) No wired-in assertion. (5) Neither 'cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test' nor 'lefthook run pre-commit passes' appear in AC — even for a kind:doc bead lefthook must gate the attempt. (6) Labels carry phase/story/area/kind but no cross-refs to the existing ADRs or specs being amended (e.g. spec:FEAT-006, adr:ADR-021). AC line 3 ('ddx doc audit clean') is not a real command and cannot be reproduced by a sub-agent cold.","score":3,"suggested_fixes":["Title: use imperative verb — e.g. 'Update FEAT-006/010/014 specs and author ADR-021 documenting escalation-ladder design'","Description: add explicit file paths for each artifact the agent must touch, e.g. 'docs/helix/specs/FEAT-006.md:L42', 'docs/helix/specs/FEAT-010.md', 'docs/helix/specs/FEAT-014.md', 'docs/helix/adr/ADR-021.md (new)'","Description: add a PROBLEM statement — what observable gap or inconsistency made this work necessary?","AC: rewrite each line as a verifiable check with a concrete command or grep pattern, e.g. 'grep -q MinPower docs/helix/adr/ADR-021.md exits 0', 'grep -q CorrelationID docs/helix/specs/FEAT-010.md exits 0'","AC: add 'lefthook run pre-commit passes' as the final AC line; add 'cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./... green' or explicitly waive with rationale if no Go files are touched","Labels: add cross-refs — e.g. 'spec:FEAT-006', 'spec:FEAT-010', 'spec:FEAT-014', 'adr:ADR-021' so reviewers and tooling can trace lineage"],"waivers_applied":[]}
